meta.tagline: One subscription. Every major AI model.
meta.description: RouterForge is a premium multi-model AI API subscription platform. Access OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and open-source models through a single reliable gateway.

home.heroTitle: One gateway to every frontier model.
home.heroSubtitle: RouterForge gives developers and teams subscription-based access to OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and open-source models — with a single API, fair pricing, and premium reliability.

models.title: All the model families you need
models.subtitle: Route to the right model for every task — reasoning, speed, code, or cost.
models.future: And new providers as they launch

one.title: Pick a plan
one.desc: Choose a time-based plan per model family, or bundle everything together.

two.title: Get your key
two.desc: A single API key gives you access to every included model through our router.

three.title: Ship faster
three.desc: OpenAI-compatible endpoints, streaming, and SDK-friendly responses. Drop it in.

developers.title: Developer-first
developers.desc: OpenAI-compatible schema, streaming, robust SDK examples, typed service layer.

scale.title: Scales with you
scale.desc: From solo hackers to enterprises with dedicated routing, quotas, and audit.

transparent.title: Transparent pricing
transparent.desc: Pay for time, not surprise token bills. Compare against provider-direct costs in your dashboard.

reliable.title: Reliable routing
reliable.desc: Multi-provider fallback, health-aware routing, and regional redundancy.

trust.title: Security & trust
trust.subtitle: Your keys, prompts, and usage are treated as production data.

privacy.title: Privacy-respecting
privacy.desc: Opt-out telemetry, no training on your data, clear retention controls.

audit.title: Full audit trail
audit.desc: Every admin action, key issuance, and sensitive lookup is logged.

compliance.title: Compliance-ready
compliance.desc: Architected for SOC 2 / ISO 27001 style controls from day one.

items.a: We sell time-based plans per model family, plus bundles. You pay a predictable subscription and we handle provider costs behind the scenes.
Plans include OpenAI / Codex, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, and curated open-source models. New providers are added via our modular adapter layer.
Yes. Our gateway exposes an OpenAI-compatible schema so most SDKs and tools work out of the box.

items.q: Do you train on my prompts?
items.a: No. Your prompt and completion data is never used to train models. Retention is configurable in Settings.
Yes. Subscriptions are time-based. Your access stays active until the paid period ends — no surprise charges.
Debit / credit cards via Polar.sh, Binance Pay, Bybit Pay, and direct crypto payments.

cta.title: Ready to ship with every model?
cta.subtitle: Create an account and get a working API key in under two minutes.

pricing.title: Simple, time-based pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Pick a model family or a bundle. Pay for time, not tokens.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.savingsSubtitle: Compared to paying providers directly for the same usage.
